title: Feasibility, Alternatives, Risk Experiments, and Stop Decisions · Stakeholder Case: Risk Experiment
summary: A long capstone plan assumes access to data, users, infrastructure, expertise, approvals, integrations, time, and operating budget that have not been tested. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the capstone risk experiment increment in feasibility proof and alternative decision record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Design the cheapest ethical experiment that distinguishes outcomes for the highest uncertainty and consequence.
Compare build, buy, configure, integrate, simplify, manual service, policy change, partnership, and no-build alternatives.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Predict Risk Experiment · Theory Risk Experiment
steps.instruction:
theory case — The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The theory variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Risk Experiment contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Risk Experiment · Theory Risk Experiment.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for design the cheapest ethical experiment that distinguishes outcomes for the highest uncertainty and consequence. For Predict Risk Experiment · Theory Risk Experiment, keep Risk Experiment connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

options.text: Design the cheapest ethical experiment that distinguishes outcomes for the highest uncertainty and consequence. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
A broad proof of concept efficiently tests all major risks. That claim fails the predict risk experiment evidence boundary for Risk Experiment.

For predict risk experiment, apply Risk Experiment without its stated preconditions, omit the feasibility proof and alternative decision record trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Risk Experiment for feasibility proof and alternative decision record.

steps.instruction:

content.text: Design the cheapest ethical experiment that distinguishes outcomes for the highest uncertainty and consequence. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Risk Experiment while producing feasibility proof and alternative decision record.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The worked example variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Design the cheapest ethical experiment that distinguishes outcomes for the highest uncertainty and consequence. A defensible solution applies Risk Experiment, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to feasibility proof and alternative decision record.

content.code:
# Worked focus: capstone-risk-experiment — Design the cheapest ethical experiment that distinguishes outcomes for the highest uncertainty and consequence.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-3
focus: capstone-risk-experiment
decision-evidence: Design the cheapest ethical experiment that distinguishes outcomes for the highest uncertainty and consequence.
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

options.text: For inspect risk experiment evidence, apply Risk Experiment without its stated preconditions, omit the feasibility proof and alternative decision record trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. The record names the assumption, applies Risk Experiment, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Risk Experiment record says feasibility proof and alternative decision record looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect risk experiment evidence boundary for Risk Experiment.

steps.title: Defend the Risk Experiment model · Theory Risk Experiment
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Risk Experiment: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — The plan assumes unavailable data, participants, approval, services, expertise, operating budget, and time while rejecting no-build alternatives. The theory variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Design the cheapest ethical experiment that distinguishes outcomes for the highest uncertainty and consequence.

Evidence target: Defend the Risk Experiment model · Theory Risk Experiment.
steps.why: Retrieving Risk Experiment through the concrete feasibility proof and alternative decision record case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Defend the Risk Experiment model · Theory Risk Experiment, keep Risk Experiment connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Design the cheapest ethical experiment that distinguishes outcomes for the highest uncertainty and consequence.
